applied_suggestions.notes: GI kept as source node (no upstream curated regulator); circadian input implicit. FKF1 receives Light+GI and degrades CDF1 (CDF1 omitted for parsimony — handled as constant contribution). Photoperiod hub gives FT two activators balancing the FLC/SVP/FLM/AP2_TOE inhibition arms.

applied_suggestions.summary: Added AUT_SYN composite (autonomous pathway) repressing FLC.
applied_suggestions.notes: Composite PROTEIN_COMPLEX collapsing FCA/FPA/FLD/FVE/LD/FY. All six paralogues act as constitutive FLC repressors with >70% functional redundancy - meets §9.3 composite criteria. Evidence drawn from FCA->FLC (E030) as representative; remaining edges (E031,E033,E034,E035,E036) noted as fallbacks.

Composite PROTEIN_COMPLEX of Polycomb Repressive Complex 2 members that silence FLC chromatin after vernalization. COOLAIR lncRNA (E158) deferred to a future iteration to keep node count moderate - COOLAIR acts cotranscriptionally and the PRC2 composite already captures the silent-FLC end state.

AP2_TOE composite collapses AP2/TOE1/TOE2/SMZ. miR172 (REGULATORY_RNA) restored. SPL9 -> Plant_Height direct edge retained in parallel to provide a coherent feed-forward loop with the new SPL9 -> miR172 -> AP2_TOE -> FT path.

applied_suggestions.summary: Added ambient-temperature FT regulators SVP and FLM.
applied_suggestions.notes: SVP and FLM kept as source nodes - curated has no explicit Temperature -> SVP/FLM edge in the current repository. ARP6->H2A_Z->FT chromatin arm (E148, E150) deferred as lower-priority and to avoid pushing FT input count past 7. Future literature-review expansion can add Temperature->SVP(-1) or ARP6->H2A_Z->FT.

applied_suggestions.summary: Added Evening Complex composite repressing PIF4_5_7.
applied_suggestions.notes: Composite PROTEIN_COMPLEX of ELF3/ELF4/LUX (Evening Complex). EC treated as constitutive source (no curated circadian upstream in the current edge pool). Raises PIF4_5_7 input count to 6 (1 activator + 5 inhibitors) - still within limits.

applied_suggestions.summary: Added minimal Strigolactone branch: SL_SYN -> Strigolactone -> Plant_Height.
applied_suggestions.notes: Full Perception Gate (D14 + MAX2 + SMXL6_7_8) NOT applied this iteration because SMXL6_7_8 has no curated output to Plant_Height or any on-cascade node (SMXL6 -> BRC1 is curated but BRC1 is absent from this height network). Adding D14/MAX2/SMXL6 without a downstream terminal would leave SMXL6 floating and be rejected by check_network_structure.py check 1. Minimal direct route SL_SYN -> Strigolactone -> Plant_Height (+1) preserves curated sign. Full Perception Gate deferred to a future iteration once MAX2 -> BZR_BES (E127) is reconsidered; currently the sign conflict (SL positive on height vs MAX2 -| BES1 -| BZR_BES would give SL negative on height) argues against wiring through BZR_BES.

applied_suggestions.summary: Added FLOWER_INT composite (SOC1/LFY/AP1) between FT and Plant_Height.
edges_removed: FT -> Plant_Height (-1) - replaced by the FT -> FLOWER_INT -> Plant_Height chain
applied_suggestions.notes: Composite PROTEIN_COMPLEX of the three canonical floral integrators. Replacing FT -> Plant_Height direct avoids adding a new inhibitor on the phenotype (slot kept). Preserves all documented FT downstream activity and adds mutant-level resolution for soc1/lfy/ap1.

Adds a PHYB-dependent photomorphogenesis arm parallel to PHYB -| PIF4_5_7. HY5 becomes the sixth Plant_Height inhibitor (within 7-cap). Raises PHYB outgoing edges to 3 (PIF4_5_7, COP1, CO) - PHYB coverage ratio improves from 0.25 to ~0.50.

applied_suggestions.summary: Added T6P sugar-signalling arm (TPS1 -> T6P -> FT, T6P -| miR156).
applied_suggestions.notes: Second sugar-to-flowering route (parallel to Sucrose -| miR156 -| SPL9). Brings FT to 7 inputs (3 activators + 4 inhibitors) - at the cap. miR156 gains a second inhibitor (Sucrose + T6P).
Completes BR antagonism model: BIN2 (-1) vs PP2A (+1) on BZR_BES. PP2A kept as constitutive source - no upstream regulator in curated edges.
SPY O-fucosylates DELLAs, enhancing repressor activity - a GA-independent DELLA activator. SPY kept as constitutive source. DELLA now has 2 inhibitors (GID1, SLY1) + 1 activator (SPY) = 3 inputs.

deferred_suggestions.reason: Applied as an annotation update would require rewriting mechanism strings on 3 existing Gibberellin->GAox edges. Defer to next JUDGE iteration if still flagged; primary focus this round is structural additions.
Same as S013 — low priority, pending structural additions.
DELLA -> GA20OX/GA3OX/GA2OX edges require Step 1 literature search (Zentella 2007 Plant Cell; Hirano 2012). Flagged for next LITERATURE REVIEW extension.
BR catabolism (BAS1/CYP72C1) requires Step 1 extension. Not applicable this iteration.

phenotype_input_summary.note: Activator count at §10 cap (5). Inhibitor count within 5-7 target. FT removed from direct phenotype inputs - now routes via FLOWER_INT (S008).

qa_results.validate_schema: PASS (all 4 BUILDER outputs valid against Pydantic schemas)
